zh.lifeSummary: 當Griffith Nanton Weaver於大約1506年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，他的父親Jenkin Weaver34歲，母親Lady Marguerite Nanton34歲。他於1528年與Edith Elizabeth Hatch在英國英格蘭戴文巴恩斯塔普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1554年在英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Griffith Nanton Weaver于大约1506年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾时，他的父亲Jenkin Weaver34岁，母亲Lady Marguerite Nanton34岁。他于1528年与Edith Elizabeth Hatch在英国英格兰戴文巴恩斯塔普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1554年在英国威尔斯拉德諾斯爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Weaver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from an agent derivative of Middle English weven ‘to weave’ (Old English wefan).

English: habitational name from a place on the Weaver river in Cheshire, now called Weaver Hall but recorded simply as Weuere in the 13th and 14th centuries. The river name is from Old English wēfer(e) ‘winding stream’.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘weaver’, for example German Weber , Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Tkacz or Tkach , Hungarian Takács (see Takacs ), and Slovenian Tkalec, Tekavec or Veber .

variants.name: Weber
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a weaver, Middle High German wëber, German Weber, an agent derivative of weben ‘to weave’. This form of the surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, and the Netherlands. In Hungary it is mostly spelled Wéber and Véber. In Russia, Slovenia, Czechia, Slovakia, and Croatia it is (also) established in the Slavicized form Veber , which is in Czechia also spelled Vebr. Compare Waber , Weaber , Weaver , Webber , and Webre .

History: As a name of ultimately Swiss German origin the surname Weber is also established among the American Mennonites. However, descendants of the early Mennonite settlers, who came to PA in the early 18th century, mostly bear the Americanized form of the name (see Weaver ).

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gruffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

nameMeanings.name: Nanton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Common European form of   Anthony   (see cognates list), now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

en.lifeSummary: When Griffith Nanton Weaver was born about 1506, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Jenkin Weaver, was 34 and his mother, Lady Marguerite Nanton, was 34. He married Edith Elizabeth Hatch in 1528, in Barnstaple, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1554, in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Griffith Nanton Weaver est né environ 1506, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jenkin Weaver, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Marguerite Nanton, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Edith Elizabeth Hatch en 1528, à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1554, à Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Griffith Nanton Weaver um 1506 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jenkin Weaver 34 und seine Mutter Lady Marguerite Nanton 34. Er hat 1528 in Barnstaple, Devon, England, United Kingdom Edith Elizabeth Hatch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1554 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Griffith Nanton Weaver è nato il circa 1506 nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Jenkin Weaver, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Lady Marguerite Nanton, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Edith Elizabeth Hatch nel 1528, nel Barnstaple, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1554, nel Radnorshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Griffith Nanton Weaverが約1506年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Jenkin Weaverは34歳，母Lady Marguerite Nantonは34歳であった。1528年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーンスタプルでEdith Elizabeth Hatchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1554年にイギリスウェールズラドノーシュアイアで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Griffith Nanton Weaver(이)가 대략 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jenkin Weaver(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marguerite Nanton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1528년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 바른스타플에서 Edith Elizabeth Hatch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1554년 영국 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Griffith Nanton Weaver nasceu aproximadamente 1506, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Jenkin Weaver, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marguerite Nanton, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith Elizabeth Hatch em 1528, em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1554, em Radnorshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Griffith Nanton Weaver родился около 1506 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jenkin Weaver было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Marguerite Nanton, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith Elizabeth Hatch в 1528 г. в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1554 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Griffith Nanton Weaver nació aproximadamente 1506, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Jenkin Weaver, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Marguerite Nanton, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Edith Elizabeth Hatch en 1528, en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1554, en Radnorshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
